metadata.siteTitle: Bolila — Placement Services affiliated with IBLT
metadata.siteDescription: Professional placement and connection services for international education, internships, scholarships, employment, and sabbatical programs.

hero.title: Your Gateway to International Opportunities
hero.subtitle: Bolila — Placement Services affiliated with IBLT — professionally connects you with international universities, internships, scholarships, employment, and sabbatical programs.

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Bolila
about.subtitle: Placement Services affiliated with IBLT
about.description: Bolila is a professional placement and connection service affiliated with IBLT (Authorization N° 11-2015N-MESR/DES). We professionally connect individuals with international opportunities in education, internships, scholarships, employment, and sabbatical programs, strictly following our guidelines and standards.
about.missionText: To provide professional, legal, and reliable placement services that connect ambitious individuals with international opportunities, following strict guidelines and recognized standards.
about.visionText: To become the most trusted and professional placement service for international mobility, known for integrity, reliability, and results.

global.title: International Reach
global.description: Connections with universities and companies worldwide

secure.title: Legal & Professional
secure.description: All services handled legally and professionally

services.label: Our Services
services.title: International Placement Services
services.subtitle: Authorized placement and connection services for global education, careers, and professional development

study.title: Study Abroad Placement
study.subtitle: International University Admissions
study.description: Your pathway to international university admissions. We professionally match students with top universities across Europe, North America, and Asia for degree programs, academic transfers, and exchange semesters. Our authorized placement service handles the complete application process — from university selection and document preparation to enrollment confirmation.

internship.title: International Internship Placement
internship.subtitle: Professional Experience Abroad
internship.description: Launch your international career with a professionally matched internship. We connect ambitious graduates and students with verified companies across Europe, North America, and Asia for internships in engineering, business, IT, healthcare, and more. Every opportunity is screened for quality, legality, and career relevance.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Search & Application
scholarship.subtitle: Funded Education Opportunities
scholarship.description: Access scholarships you didn't know existed. Our team actively researches and matches eligible candidates with merit-based, need-based, and government-funded scholarships at universities worldwide. From Erasmus+ and Chevening to regional government grants, we identify opportunities that match your profile and maximize your chances of securing funding.

sabbatical.title: Sabbatical Professional Experience
sabbatical.subtitle: Career-Enriching Vacation Programs
sabbatical.description: Transform your time off into career-enriching professional experience abroad. Designed for employed professionals taking sabbatical leave, we arrange short-term work placements at your vacation destination. Gain international perspective, expand your professional network, and return with enhanced skills — all handled legally and professionally.

employment.title: International Job Placement
employment.subtitle: Global Career Opportunities
employment.description: Your bridge to international career opportunities. We legally match job seekers with verified employers across industries — from engineering and healthcare to IT and business management. Our authorized placement service ensures every opportunity is legitimate, professionally vetted, and aligned with your qualifications and career goals.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.q1: What documents do I need to apply?
faq.a1: You will need a valid passport, CV/resume, educational certificates or diploma, and proof of payment. All documents must be in PDF or image format (JPG, PNG), max 5MB per file.
faq.q2: How long does the application process take?
faq.a2: Processing times vary depending on the service and institution. Generally, you can expect to hear from us within 2-8 weeks after a complete submission.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We handle all your data and documents professionally and securely, with strict confidentiality.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: We accept credit and debit card payments. The pre-registration fee must be paid before your application can be processed.
faq.q5: Can I apply for multiple services?
faq.a5: Yes, you can submit separate applications for different services. Each application is processed independently.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Take the first step towards your international future. Apply now and let us connect you with the right opportunities.
